# ВиК Петров — Plumbing Services in Sofia, Bulgaria

## Business Summary

ВиК Петров (VIK Petrov) is a specialized plumbing (ВиК) services company in Sofia, Bulgaria, founded by Teodor Petrov. The business has 12 years of professional experience providing water supply and sewage (ВиК) installation, repair, and emergency services.

**Contact:**
- Phone: +359896934144 (0896 934 144)
- Email: vik-petrov@abv.bg
- Address: ul. Malchika 6, 1191 Sofia, Bulgaria
- Working hours: Every day 07:00–22:00

**Key facts:**
- 12+ years experience
- Response time: within 1 hour
- Warranty: 12 months on all work
- Payment: Cash
- 3000+ satisfied clients
- Service area: Sofia and surrounding neighborhoods

## Services

- Boiler installation (монтаж на бойлер): 70–130 BGN
- Drain unblocking (отпушване на канал): 70–120 BGN
- Full bathroom installation (монтаж на баня): from 220 BGN
- Water meter replacement (смяна на водомер): 50–60 BGN
- Faucet/mixer installation (монтаж на смесител): 80–160 BGN
- Toilet installation (монтаж на тоалетна): 80–280 BGN
- Bathtub/shower installation (монтаж на вана/душ): 120–260 BGN
- Sink installation (монтаж на мивка): 100–160 BGN
- Washing machine/dishwasher installation: 70–100 BGN
- Emergency plumbing 24/7: price by agreement
- Riser pipe replacement: price by inspection

## Service Areas in Sofia

Pancharevo, Kokaliane, Lozen, German, Gorubliane, Bistritsa, Boyana, Dragalevtsi, Simeonovo, Mladost, Drujba, Krivina, Kazichene, Pasarel
